title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Pranpur
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Pranpur assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Political rally in Pranpur draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Pranpur promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Pranpur
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Pranpur constituency.
